info.title: Akta.pro API
info.description:
Akta provides APIs for company intelligence and news monitoring:

1. **News** – Enriched news articles with AI summaries, sentiment, event tags, industry classifications, and company mention resolution.
2. **Company Enrichment** – Structured company data including firmographics, funding, headcount, and financials.
3. **Company Search** – Free endpoint to resolve company names, domains, or UUIDs.
4. **Product Reviews** – G2 product reviews with ratings and review content.
5. **Employee Reviews** – Employee sentiment data with workplace ratings.

**Authentication:** All endpoints require an API key in the `x-api-key` HTTP header.

xApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
xApiKeyAuth.description: API key obtained from your Akta account.

url.description: Canonical URL of the original article.

news_score.description: Relevance and quality score between 0.0 and 1.0.

full_text.description: Complete body text of the article.

countries.description: Array of ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.

types.description: News types associated with the article.

is_primary.description: True if this is the primary industry classification.
True if this is the primary event tag.
True if this is the main company the article is about.

uuid.description: Unique Akta identifier for the company.

similarity.description: Similarity score between the query and the matched industry, ranging from 0 to 1. Higher values indicate a closer match.

id.description: Unique identifier for the product. Use this value in the products query parameter to fetch reviews.

categories.description: All categories the product belongs to.

rating.description: Average rating per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. g2) and values are floats. Present only when products is provided.

star_distribution.description: Distribution of star ratings per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. g2), values are objects keyed by star value (1 through 5) with integer counts. Present only when products is provided.

pros_list.description: Aggregated pros mentioned across reviews. Present only when products is provided.

cons_list.description: Aggregated cons mentioned across reviews. Present only when products is provided.

pricing.description: Pricing information for the product. Present only when products is provided.

reviews.description: Reviews container. Present only when products is provided.

total.description: Total number of reviews available for the product across all providers.

total_by_provider.description: Total review count broken down by provider.

review_title.description: Title of the review as submitted by the reviewer.

review_question_answers.description: Structured question-and-answer pairs from the review.

publish_date.description: Publication date of the review in ISO 8601 format.

review_link.description: Link to the original review on the provider's site.

overall_rating.description: Overall company rating per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. glassdoor), values are floats.

type.description: Rating dimension. Example: business_outlook, ceo, recommend_to_friend, compensation_and_benefits, culture_and_values, diversity_and_inclusion, senior_management, work_life_balance.

value.description: Rating value. Sentiment-style dimensions (business_outlook, ceo, recommend_to_friend) are 0 to 1 percentage; other dimensions are 0 to 5 scale.

other_ratings.description: Dimension-level ratings broken out per provider.

total.description: Total number of reviews available for the company across all providers.

total_by_provider.description: Total review count broken down by provider.

rating.description: Overall star rating given by the reviewer.

review_link.description: Link to the original review on the provider's site.

employment_status.description: Employment type of the reviewer. Example: REGULAR, CONTRACT.

is_current_employee.description: True if the reviewer was a current employee at the time of writing.

years_of_employment.description: Reviewer's tenure at the company in years.

country_code.description: Country code of the reviewer's location.

helpful_count.description: Number of users who marked the review as helpful.

not_helpful_count.description: Number of users who marked the review as not helpful.

ceo_rating.description: Reviewer's CEO sentiment. Example: APPROVE, DISAPPROVE.

compensation_and_benefits_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for compensation and benefits.

culture_and_values_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for culture and values.

diversity_and_inclusion_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for diversity and inclusion.

company_name.description: Name of the company to add. Example: solios

website.description: Primary website URL of the company. Used to disambiguate and resolve the company. Example: https://www.soleosenergy.com/

already_exists.description: true if the company is already in the database, in which case no addition request is created. false if a new addition request was created.

company.description: The existing company's details when already_exists is true; otherwise null.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the addition request, in UUID format. Use this to check request status or match webhook notifications. null when the company already exists.

status.description: Current status of the addition request at submission time. Typically pending. null when the company already exists.

domain.description: The resolved domain for the submitted company.

credits_consumed.description: Credits consumed by the request. This endpoint is free and always returns 0.00.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the company. Pass this as the company parameter in downstream APIs.

legal_name.description: Legal or registered name of the company.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the request being tracked.

request_type.description: The type of request. Example: company_addition

status.description: Current status of the request. Possible values: pending, in_progress, completed, failed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the request was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

company_addition_request_id.description: Identifier of the underlying request record.

company_name.description: Name of the company submitted for addition.

domain.description: Resolved domain of the submitted company.

status.description: Status of the underlying request. Possible values: pending, in_progress, completed, failed.

reason.description: Explanation when the request did not succeed. null unless the request has failed.

company_uuid.description: Akta UUID of the company once it has been added. null until the request is completed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the underlying request was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the underlying request was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

tags.name: News
tags.description: Enriched news articles with AI summaries, sentiment, and company mentions

tags.name: Company
tags.description: Company data enrichment, search, and addition

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Product and employee reviews from external sources

get.description:
Fetch enriched news articles for a company or industry. Each article includes AI-generated summary, full text, sentiment, event tags, industry classifications, and resolved company mentions.
Results are returned synchronously — no polling required.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Website (e.g. 'https://canva.com') or company UUID returned by the Company Search API.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Comma separated list of industry codes to filter articles by. Use industry search endpoint to fetch the list of industry codes for a given industry topic.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Topic name to search articles. Allows open-ended topic name. Eg. Crude oil price developments

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Searches articles based on the title entered.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD. Non-enterprise plans are limited to a 6-month lookback.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD. Default = today.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of news articles to return. Default = 10, Max = 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

parameters.name: group_articles
parameters.description: Accepts boolean. True will group similar articles from the same event.

parameters.name: news_score_list
parameters.description: Filter by news score tier. Accepted values: High, Medium, Low, all. Default = all

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Filters articles based on the country of the event. Comma separated list of ISO country codes.

parameters.name: blacklisted
parameters.description: Comma separated list of publisher domains to exclude.

parameters.name: type_list
parameters.description: Filter by news type. Download full list from https://playground.akta.pro/news-tags.csv. Default = all.

parameters.name: sentiment_list
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sentiments to filter by. Accepted values: positive, negative, neutral, all. Default = all. Example: sentiment_list=positive,negative

parameters.name: entity_person_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of people names.

parameters.name: entity_location_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of locations.

parameters.name: entity_product_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of product names.

parameters.name: entity_event_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of event names.

parameters.name: naics_code_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of NAICS codes.

parameters.name: sic_code_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of SIC codes.

parameters.name: iptc_code_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of IPTC codes.

parameters.name: iab_code_list
parameters.description: Comma separated list of IAB codes.

count.description: Number of articles returned in the data array.

204.description: No content — no articles matched the query.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Resolve a company name, website domain, or UUID into a structured company record.
This is a free endpoint — it does not consume API credits.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A company name, website. The backend automatically resolves the input type. Examples: https://canva.com, canva

204.description: No content — no companies matched the query.

400.description: Bad request — missing or malformed query parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Retrieve structured company data — firmographics, funding, headcount, web traffic, business model, and financials.
Specify which sections you need; only requested sections are returned.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'https://canva.com') or a company UUID (e.g. '00031n-tesla'). The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: sections
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sections to return. Copy-paste example: `firmographic,business_model,company_assessment,trust_signal,company_hierarchy,digital_presence,financial_estimate,location,management_profile,product_offering,strategic_signal,customer_profile,industry,technology,funding_detail,mna_and_investment`. Note: `funding_detail` and `mna_and_investment` are available on the Enterprise tier only.

data.description: Enriched company data keyed by section name.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient access for requested section.

get.description:
Fetches a company's product catalog and detailed reviews per product including ratings, star distribution, pros, cons, pricing and individual review content.
Results are returned in the API response.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: products
parameters.description: List of product_id values to fetch reviews for. Pass the parameter multiple times to request more than one product. If omitted, the response returns the product list only.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reviews to return per product. Only applies when products is provided.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of reviews to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Fetch a company's employee review data including overall ratings, dimension-level ratings (culture, work-life balance, senior management and more) and individual employee reviews.
Results are returned in the API response.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reviews to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of reviews to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Resolves an industry from a free-text query and returns matching industry codes ranked by similarity.
This is a free endpoint — it does not consume API credits.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text industry name or topic to search for. Example: 'warehouse automation'

count.description: Number of industry objects returned in the data array.

204.description: No content — no industries matched the query.

400.description: Bad request — missing or malformed query parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description: Fetches a company's LinkedIn-sourced headcount data, including total employee count, historical growth trends, and a functional breakdown of the workforce.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description: Fetches live LinkedIn and Indeed job listings for a company, including title, location, description, compensation, experience level, and extracted key skills.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of job listings to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of listings to skip before returning records.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description: Fetches social media posts published by a company, including content type, text, publish date, paid/repost flags, an AI classification, and detailed engagement metrics.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of posts to skip before returning records.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description: Fetches a company's website traffic signals, including engagement metrics, historical monthly visit estimates, and a breakdown of traffic by acquisition source.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

post.description:
Submits a company that is not yet in akta.pro's database to be added, returning a request ID to track, or the existing company if it is already present.
This is a free endpoint — it does not consume API credits.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Returns the current status of an asynchronous request, such as a company addition request, by its request ID.
This is a free endpoint — it does not consume API credits.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the request to check, returned when the original request was submitted. Example: 2db01b38-5c81-4b3f-b76d-8b36aeed603b

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.
